target_query: how to make pour over coffee
snippet_target: To make pour-over coffee: grind 60 g of coffee per litre to a medium-fine texture, wet the filter, add grounds, bloom for 30-45 seconds, then pour in slow spirals at 195-205°F until you hit your target weight — about three minutes total.

outline.heading: How do you make pour-over coffee, step by step?
How do you fix a bad pour-over?

do_not_fabricate: Any specific bean's tasting notes without a source
